message:
docs: credit Peter Steinberger for Oracle

Add acknowledgment that Oracle is an excellent tool created by Peter
Steinberger, with links to his GitHub profile.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch: @@ -1110,7 +1110,7 @@ APR respects the [NO_COLOR](https://no-color.org/) standard. When `NO_COLOR` is | Package | Purpose | |---------|---------| | Bash 4+ | Script runtime | -| Oracle | GPT Pro browser automation | +| [Oracle](https://github.com/steipete/oracle) | GPT Pro browser automation (excellent tool by [Peter Steinberger](https://github.com/steipete)) | | Node.js 18+ | Oracle runtime | | curl or wget | Installation | @@ -1302,6 +1302,8 @@ MIT License. See [LICENSE](LICENSE) for details. --- -Built with Oracle, gum, and a healthy appreciation for iterative refinement. +Built with [Oracle](https://github.com/steipete/oracle), [gum](https://github.com/charmbracelet/gum), and a healthy appreciation for iterative refinement. + +Special thanks to [Peter Steinberger](https://github.com/steipete) for creating Oracle, the excellent browser automation tool that makes APR possible.
